'''This [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Priest/Legends|priestess]]''' served as the [[Warrior caste|warrior]]-[[Seer (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|seer]] of [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] in the prelude to the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]]. She was greatly concerned about [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra's]] order to attack [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], openly saying that Shimrra was deranged in Choka's [[Warmaster's command grotto|command grotto]]. While Choka himself was sympathetic, he warned the seer to be cautious about what she said outside the grotto. She also talked with the [[Royal Seers]], saying that they would stretch the truth about when to attack to give Choka more time.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
